subject: LysR

facts.label: MexT
facts.desc: MexT is a LysR-type transcriptional activator that positively regulates the expression of MexEF-OprN, OprD, and MexS.

facts.label: ampR transcriptional regulator with mutation conferring resistance to monobactam antibiotics
facts.desc: ampR is a LysR-type transcriptional regulator for beta-lactamase-encoding gene expression. Mutations in ampR of certain organisms have been shown to confer resistance to antibiotics due to beta-lactamase overexpression.

facts.label: NmcR
facts.desc: NmcR is a homolog of the LysR regulator found in Enterobacter cloacae that contribute to the regulation of NmcA beta-lactamase.

facts.label: leuO
facts.desc: leuO, a LysR family transcription factor, exists in a wide variety of bacteria of the family Enterobacteriaceae and is involved in the regulation of as yet unidentified genes affecting the stress response and pathogenesis expression. LeuO is also an activator of the MdtNOP efflux pump.

block:
CARD/ARO ARO:3000814 — MexT: MexT is a LysR-type transcriptional activator that positively regulates the expression of MexEF-OprN, OprD, and MexS.
CARD/ARO ARO:3007797 — ampR transcriptional regulator with mutation conferring resistance to monobactam antibiotics: ampR is a LysR-type transcriptional regulator for beta-lactamase-encoding gene expression. Mutations in ampR of certain organisms have been shown to confer resistance to antibiotics due to beta-lactamase overexpression.
CARD/ARO ARO:3003665 — NmcR: NmcR is a homolog of the LysR regulator found in Enterobacter cloacae that contribute to the regulation of NmcA beta-lactamase.
CARD/ARO ARO:3003843 — leuO: leuO, a LysR family transcription factor, exists in a wide variety of bacteria of the family Enterobacteriaceae and is involved in the regulation of as yet unidentified genes affecting the stress response and pathogenesis expression. LeuO is also an activator of the MdtNOP efflux pump.
